sections.content:
Clicking on the blue blob at row 58, col 46 had no impact (no_impact=True, gameplay_changed=False). The animation shows changes in the right panel's buttons and the blue blob, but no gameplay change.
Let me try clicking on the blue square at the bottom left. The blue square's bbox is (51,6)-(54,17). Let me try clicking at the center of the blue square, which is row 52, col 11.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the blue square more carefully. The blue square has a yellow object inside it. Maybe the blue square is a target or indicator, not a button.
Let me try clicking on the gray square at the bottom. The gray square's bbox is (51,35)-(54,56). Let me try clicking at the center of the gray square, which is row 52, col 45.
Actually, let me step back and think about the game's mechanics more carefully. In Level 1, I clicked on buttons to toggle them and then clicked a submit button to complete the level. The submit button was probably the blue blob.
In Level 2, I clicked on the right panel's buttons to toggle them. The right panel's buttons now match the left panel's configuration. But clicking on the blue blob had no impact.
Maybe the goal in Level 2 is different from Level 1. Maybe the goal is to match the right panel's button configuration to the gray square's pattern, not the left panel's configuration.
Let me re-examine the gray square's pattern:
- Row 52: BBBBBBBBBBBWWWWWWWWWW (cols 35-55)
  - Cols 35-45: BBBBBBBBBBB (11 black cells) - buttons 1-2 ON
  - Cols 46-55: WWWWWWWWWW (10 white cells) - buttons 3-4 OFF
- Row 53: BBBBBBBBBBBWBBBBBBBBB (cols 35-55)
  - Cols 35-45: BBBBBBBBBBB (11 black cells) - buttons 1-2 ON
  - Col 46: W (1 white cell) - button 3 OFF
  - Cols 47-55: BBBBBBBBB (9 black cells) - button 4 ON
- Row 54: BBBBBBBBBbbbbbBBBBBBB (cols 35-55)
  - Cols 35-43: BBBBBBBBBBB (9 black cells) - buttons 1-2 ON
  - Cols 44-47: bbbbb (5 blue cells) - button 2-3 boundary
  - Cols 48-55: BBBBBBB (8 black cells) - buttons 3-4 ON
The gray square's pattern indicates:
- Row 33: buttons 1-2 ON, buttons 3-4 OFF
- Row 39: buttons 1-2 ON, button 3 OFF, button 4 ON
- Row 45: buttons 1-2 ON, buttons 3-4 ON (based on the blue cells)
But the right panel's current configuration is:
- Row 33: all ON
- Row 39: all OFF
- Row 45: all OFF
This doesn't match the gray square's pattern. Let me reset the right panel's buttons to match the gray square's pattern.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the gray square's pattern. The gray square has 3 rows:
- Row 52: buttons 1-2 ON, buttons 3-4 OFF
- Row 53: buttons 1-2 ON, button 3 OFF, button 4 ON
- Row 54: buttons 1-2 ON, buttons 3-4 ON (based on the blue cells)
But the right panel has 3 rows of buttons:
- Row 33: all ON
- Row 39: all OFF
- Row 45: all OFF
So the gray square's pattern does not match the right panel's current configuration. Let me reset the right panel's buttons to match the gray square's pattern.
But wait, I already tried matching the right panel's buttons to the gray square's pattern earlier, and it didn't work. Let me try a different approach.
Maybe the goal is to click on the right panel's buttons to match the left panel's button configuration AND click on the submit button. But clicking on the blue blob had no impact.
Let me try clicking on the blue square at the bottom left. The blue square's bbox is (51,6)-(54,17). Let me try clicking at the center of the blue square, which is row 52, col 11.
